title: Tool-Assisted Level Builder
genericDescription: Build internal tools; represent levels as editable data; separate authoring from runtime play.
specificDescription: Build a small game plus a level editing tool, in-engine editor workflow, or external data workflow. Submit three levels made with the tool and a one-page tool guide for another designer.
gradingRubric: 30 pts tool usefulness; 20 pts runtime integration; 20 pts quality of authored levels; 15 pts usability of guide; 15 pts maintainability.
